title: loyza
description: modpack made for a private server containing qols, optimizations, tools, tweaks and a sprinkle of vanilla+ content
body:
A modpack made for a private server.

This modpack contains mainly qols (quality of life changes), optimizations, tools, and tweaks, trying to make the playable experience as smooth as possible for both casual and for technical players; adding just a sprinkle of fresh vanilla+ like content, but also keeping vanilla mechanics practically untouched from a technical standpoint.
